_comment: Allowlist for apps/docs/scripts/audit-tokens.mjs. Each entry: file (path from apps/docs/), category, optional line, and reason. Omit line to allow file-wide for that category.

allowed.reason: This file DEFINES the typography scale. Each --text-* var declares its px value — auditor sees the line as a property assignment not a var definition because the value sits on a separate line.
pb-[1px] is hairline kerning for crown-tip vertical alignment over the shield. Sub-token micro-adjust, not spacing rhythm.
Global docs typography scale (h1..h6 + .text-* utility classes mirror typography.css). Definitional, not consumption.
Marketing-auth hero illustration uses large decorative whitespace (py-[72px], pl-[76px], py-[120px]) beyond Dash component-rhythm grid (caps at 48). Layout-decoration, not component spacing.
py-[100px] marketing-auth hero whitespace beyond Dash grid (48). Layout-decoration.
py-[100px] marketing-auth hero whitespace beyond Dash grid (48). Layout-decoration.
py-[100px] marketing-auth hero whitespace beyond Dash grid (48). Layout-decoration.
py-[100px] marketing-auth hero whitespace beyond Dash grid (48). Layout-decoration.
pl-[68px] aligns chart x-axis labels with a custom chart canvas (data-driven offset, not spacing rhythm).
